META.TITLE: Rodrigo Pizarro - Full Stack Developer from Chile
META.DESCRIPTION: +5 years as a Full Stack Developer from Chile, I use Laravel and Vue.js to deliver user friendly solutions.

EXPERIENCES.DESCRIPTION: Part of the developers that were in charge of the cloud migration of the principal product of the company. And built some of the internal control panels that improves the sales process.
In charge of the development of the first version of the CronApp platform for web browsers and mobile devices. Using Google Cloud Plataform to serve this solution to over 100 users.

profile.shortDescription: +5 years as a full stack developer using Laravel + Vue.js to deliver user friendly solutions.

about.title: More about me
about.description: My name is Rodrigo, I'm a developer from Chile. I discover programming at the university and that unfold a world of infinite possibilities.
about.interests: I'm a Judoka, I practice this sport since 2015 and also love to read fantasy books. Big fan of The Stormlight Archive. And sometimes I built model kits of Gundams.
